en: You guys knew about this, and you didn't tell us?
He had sex, and we get hit in our heads.
ko: 우리한테 말하지도 않고 섹스하고 머리를 맞았어.

en: You know what? I want you to leave. Get out of here. Just get out now. No, no. I know. I want to stay.
ko: 아니, 나는 여기 있고 싶어, 이야기하고 싶어.

en: I want to talk about this. Okay. All right.
What? Was she good? Don't answer that.
I don't know. She said, you wanted to talk about it. Let's talk about it. How was she?
ko: 잘 모르겠어. 그녀가 말하길, 너가 이야기하고 싶다고 했어. 이야기해보자. 그녀는 어땠어?

en: She was... Awful. Horrible. She was not good. Not good.
Nothing compared to you. She... She was different.
ko: 너와 비교할 수 없어. 그녀는... 그녀는 달랐어.

en: Should we do something? Yeah, never cheat on Rachel.
ko: 뭔가 해야 할까? 응, 레이첼을 절대 속이지 마.

en: I'm sorry, okay? I'm sorry. I was disgusted with myself, and this morning, I was so...
ko: 미안해, 정말 미안해, 나 자신이 역겨웠어.
